meta.tagline: Working control room for products, experiments, prototypes, operators, and approvals.
meta.north_star: Make Prompt Engines legible, controllable, and shippable from one operating surface.

principles: Governance and budgets keep automation bounded.
anthropic_skill_standard: Skills begin from concrete use cases.
Progressive disclosure: frontmatter, SKILL.md, linked assets.
Important skills are tested for triggering, success, and workflow improvement.

agents.name: A.I.
agents.role: Principal direction, final approval, portfolio decisions
agents.notes: Internal source of truth for direction and approvals.

agents.name: Andy Stable
agents.role: Public-facing founder/operator profile and legacy operating reference
agents.notes: Public materials still reference Andy heavily; internal mapping should stay explicit.

agents.name: Hermetic_Demiurge
agents.notes: Primary engineering operator for MVP build work.

agents.name: Thoth
agents.notes: Maintains operational memory and reporting surfaces.

agents.name: Prometheus
agents.role: Prototype ignition, venture acceleration, exploratory build loops
agents.notes: Best used on venture motion and prototype-to-product transitions.

agents.name: Golem
agents.role: Scheduled operations, heartbeats, reliability, recurring maintenance
agents.notes: Natural owner for cron-backed loops and guardrailed automation.

ventures.name: PromptEngines.com
ventures.next_action: Keep the public platform aligned with the actual portfolio and build stream.
ventures.wiring: Need final decision on what remains public versus internal in the dashboard era.

ventures.name: Lab Notes
ventures.next_action: Tighten the loop from build stream to public synthesis.
ventures.wiring: Needs publishing workflow and source-of-truth status sync.

ventures.name: Pantheon OS Dashboard
ventures.next_action: Complete the static MVP, then wire auth, metrics adapters, and deployment.
ventures.wiring: Needs Vercel project/domain hookup, auth provider, and product metrics secrets from human side.

ventures.name: Build Stream
ventures.next_action: Feed build-stream signal directly into Pantheon OS activity and weekly review.
ventures.wiring: Needs authenticated GitHub event/token confirmation for production feed.

ventures.name: Consulting
ventures.next_action: Standardize the offer ladder and bridge services into productized modules.
ventures.wiring: Needs actual pipeline, offer, and delivery KPIs from human side.

ventures.name: Kaizen
ventures.next_action: Wire real telemetry, activation, and learning loops into the dashboard.
ventures.wiring: Need Supabase/project credentials and event contract confirmation.

ventures.name: Storybook Studio
ventures.next_action: Stabilize print-ready workflow and launch gating.
ventures.wiring: Need printing/order metrics mapping and launch approval criteria.

ventures.name: Norbu
ventures.next_action: Add content cadence, curriculum state, and product heartbeat.
ventures.wiring: Need actual content and learner KPIs.

ventures.name: Bible
ventures.next_action: Move from placeholder telemetry to real usage and reliability stats.
ventures.wiring: Need DB credential and metrics schema confirmation.

ventures.name: Flow
ventures.next_action: Resolve public status drift and decide whether Flow is active product or held experiment.
ventures.wiring: Need canonical status decision from human side.

ventures.name: Video Terminal
ventures.next_action: Define the smallest shippable operator loop and showcase build stream.
ventures.wiring: Need actual alpha user and workflow metrics if available.

ventures.name: Flow Education
ventures.next_action: Turn prototype lessons into roadmap, milestones, and pilot criteria.
ventures.wiring: Need owner confirmation and promotion criteria.

ventures.name: Vajra-Upaya
ventures.next_action: Frame the precision tool-fitting service and decide public launch readiness.
ventures.wiring: Need offer definition and service metrics from human side.

ventures.name: Blayde
ventures.next_action: Decide whether Blayde remains a concept, prototype, or separate venture track.
ventures.wiring: Need human decision on what Blayde actually is in the portfolio.

goals.title: Make Prompt Engines legible and controllable from one operating surface.
goals.target_metric: Every venture has owner, stage, health, next action, and wiring status.

goals.title: Ship Pantheon OS MVP with Prompt Engines-aligned mock data.
goals.target_metric: Working dashboard in repo and portal with static mock data and explicit human wiring list.

goals.title: Unify metrics and venture status contracts across the portfolio.
goals.target_metric: Kaizen, Storybook, Bible, and Flow all have explicit adapter contracts.

goals.title: Install recurring operator heartbeats across portfolio review, build stream, and venture refreshes.
goals.target_metric: Every active venture has at least one recurring review loop.

tasks.title: Build the static dashboard shell, cards, and sections.
tasks.next_step: Keep iterating on data fidelity and wiring notes.

tasks.title: Align mock data with Prompt Engines products, experiments, prototypes, and operators.
List exactly which credentials, decisions, and integrations are still needed from the human side.
tasks.next_step: Provide final auth, domain, and metrics secrets.

tasks.title: Resolve Flow status drift between public site, dashboard code, and internal view.
Wire real metrics adapters for Kaizen, Storybook, Bible, and Flow.
tasks.next_step: Needs credentials and event contracts from human side.

heartbeats.name: Daily operator loop
heartbeats.expected_output: What exists, what changed, what needs attention, what is ready to ship.

heartbeats.name: Kaizen status refresh
heartbeats.expected_output: Health, activation, and next action refresh.

heartbeats.name: Storybook launch gate review
heartbeats.expected_output: Launch blockers and launch decision packet.

approvals.title: Approve MVP deployment path for dashboard.promptengines.com
Approve internal/public boundary and auth model for Pantheon OS
Approve live metrics secrets and adapter wiring for portfolio apps
Approve canonical Flow status and stage

activity.summary: Scaffolded the dashboard MVP branch and pushed phase 1.
Prepared next daily digest contract for cross-repo activity.
Marked telemetry adapter as needing live credentials and event contract review.
Updated launch gate status to pre-launch with approval path pending.
Flagged status drift between homepage, dashboard code, and live app list.
Reaffirmed consultancy-to-product bridge as a major strategic path.

wiring.title: dashboard.promptengines.com deployment target
wiring.needed_from_human: Connect Vercel project/domain and confirm whether the MVP is internal-only or gated public.

wiring.title: Auth boundary and session model
wiring.needed_from_human: Choose auth provider and define who can see internal systems, budgets, and approvals.

wiring.title: Live metrics adapters
wiring.needed_from_human: Provide Supabase/Neon/project secrets and confirm event schema for Kaizen, Storybook, Bible, and Flow.

wiring.title: GitHub build stream and activity feed token
wiring.needed_from_human: Provide production token/secret path for authenticated build-stream sync.

wiring.title: Canonical Flow status
wiring.needed_from_human: Decide whether Flow should appear as active product, experiment, or coming soon.

wiring.title: Static MVP data contract
wiring.needed_from_human: None for demo; replace JSON with live adapters later.

memory.summary: Pantheon OS is the internal system name; the dashboard target host is dashboard.promptengines.com.
Public/private boundary is not yet finalized, so MVP should stay mock-data and cautious.
Prompt Engines currently spans products, experiments, prototypes, services, and internal systems that need one shared operating surface.
